title: Macro Calculator
explanation: It lets viewers input their daily calories and desired macro percentages to compute gram amounts for carbs, protein, and fat.

cells:
def calculate():
    carbs_g = total_calories * (carbs_pct / 100) / 4
    protein_g = total_calories * (protein_pct / 100) / 4
    fat_g = total_calories * (fat_pct / 100) / 9
    print(f"Carbs: {carbs_g:.1f} g, Protein: {protein_g:.1f} g, Fat: {fat_g:.1f} g")

title: Calorie calculator based on food weight
explanation: It lets viewers instantly see how many calories they consume by weighing their food in grams.

cells:
import numpy as np

def calories(grams):
    # Peanut butter ~588 kcal per 100 g
    return grams * 5.88

print(f"Calories for {grams} g: {calories(grams):.1f}")

title: Convert grams of peanut butter to tablespoons
explanation: Shows how many tablespoons correspond to a chosen gram amount, enabling precise portion control.

title: Peanut Butter Calorie Calculator
explanation: Allows users to set a gram amount of peanut butter and instantly see the corresponding calories and tablespoon serving size.

cells:
# Compute calories per gram based on known values
cal_per_gram = 95 / 16

# Optional: compute tablespoons from grams
tbsp = grams / 16
